column2: Verify blog viewing, creation, and interaction functionalities (Like, Comment, Poll).

column3:
1. Go to Blog section
2. Click Create Post
3. Fill Title and Content
4. Submit
column4: System displays "Đăng bài viết thành công" and post is visible

column3:
1. Click Create Post
2. Leave title and content blank
3. Submit
column4: System displays error "Vui lòng nhập tiêu đề hoặc nội dung"

column3:
1. Navigate to a blog
2. Click Like button
column4: Like count increases and icon is highlighted
column15: Like count did not update on UI instantly in R1 (Bug #52)

column3:
1. Navigate to a blog
2. Enter comment text
3. Submit
column4: Comment is added and displayed below the blog post

column3:
1. Navigate to a blog
2. Click Save (Bookmark) icon
column4: "Đã lưu bài viết" message is displayed, icon updates

column3:
1. Find a blog with a poll
2. Select an option
3. Submit vote
column4: System displays "Bình chọn thành công" and vote counts update
column15: Like count did not update on UI instantly in R1

column3:
1. Go to own blog post
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm
column4: System displays "Đã xóa bài viết thành công" and blog is removed

column3:
1. Click Report on a blog
2. Enter reason
3. Submit
column4: System displays "Đã gửi báo cáo thành công"
